overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, neon-lit streets, and reflective wet surfaces under bright midday sun. The camera smoothly navigates through open plazas, crosses busy intersections, and traverses covered walkways and narrow alleys.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza while observing the towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the plaza

entered.detail: tall building covered in large digital advertisements and neon signage
dark modern structure with prominent 'ENDACHI' signage in white letters
wet-looking reflective pavement mirroring the surrounding buildings
tall glass and steel tower with multiple levels
small structure or vendor booth on the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a vast futuristic plaza with highly reflective ground surfaces mirroring the surrounding cyberpunk architecture. The camera moves forward through sparse pedestrian traffic, showcasing towering buildings adorned with massive holographic advertisements under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with elevated pedestrian ramp

events.description: crossing the street at the yellow striped crosswalk while vehicles wait nearby
turning left and ascending the ramp alongside the main road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking up the ramp, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the road parallel to the ramp

entered.detail: elevated glass-enclosed walkway connecting buildings above the street
bold yellow zebra crossing markings on the asphalt
elevated walkway ramp with yellow edge markings ascending alongside the road
black and yellow bollards lining the edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a busy city intersection marked with yellow crosswalk lines, then ascends a ramp alongside the road. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street above, while vehicles move along the road to the right. The ENDACHI building recedes into the distance as the camera climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with green neon underpass lighting

events.description: entering the covered walkway with prominent green neon strip lighting along the walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pathway beside the road, passing under the building overhang

entered.detail: horizontal cyan-green neon light strips mounted on the wall at regular intervals
dark overhanging structure of the building creating a covered walkway
low wall separating the walkway from the adjacent road
tall dark facade of the building with minimal windows

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered walkway illuminated by striking green neon strip lights along the left wall. The camera moves forward under the building overhang, with a concrete barrier separating the path from the road traffic on the right. The environment becomes more enclosed with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian shopping street with outdoor cafes

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into an open pedestrian street with shops and palm trees

agents.ego_description: strolling through the pedestrian shopping area, passing by outdoor seating and storefronts

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tables and chairs with umbrellas outside a cafe, some patrons seated
tall palm tree growing from a planter in the pedestrian area
storefronts with large glass windows and illuminated signage
small kiosk or food stand with green and yellow coloring

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the camera enters a lively pedestrian shopping street lined with outdoor cafes and palm trees. The area features moderate foot traffic with people browsing shops and sitting at cafe tables. The ground transitions to paved tiles and the space opens up while maintaining urban density.

events.description: entering a narrow corridor with intense green neon lighting on the walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway, navigating between pedestrians and shop stalls

notable_agents.action: group of people walking ahead in the narrow passage

entered.detail: large illuminated green panels and strips covering the building wall
tall building facades creating a narrow corridor on both sides
compact storefronts and vendor booths lining the alley wall
elevated walkway or bridge connecting buildings above the alley

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a narrow, enclosed alleyway bathed in intense green neon light from wall-mounted panels. The space is tight with tall buildings on both sides, small shop stalls lining the left wall, and moderate pedestrian traffic moving through the corridor. An overhead bridge is visible in the distance as the camera progresses deeper into the alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, sun-drenched futuristic plaza into the claustrophobic, neon-lit depths of a narrow urban alley. It begins by gliding across highly reflective ground surfaces beneath towering holographic advertisements and bright midday sun, moving through sparse pedestrian traffic. As the camera crosses a busy intersection and ascends a road ramp, the open skyline begins to tighten, shifting from the receding view of the ENDACHI building into a semi-covered walkway defined by striking green neon strip lights. The scene then opens briefly into a lively pedestrian shopping street filled with outdoor cafes and palm trees before turning sharply into a confined corridor. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed as the camera progresses deeper into a tight alleyway bathed in intense green light and lined with small shop stalls.
